description_long: This SUV features a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of classic off-road vehicles, with a high roofline and pronounced wheel arches. The body is primarily black with a contrasting white roof, and the windows are tinted dark, giving it a modern, sleek appearance. The front grille is bold and angular, flanked by rectangular headlights and a robust bumper. The side profile reveals four doors, flush door handles, and a spare tire mounted on the rear door, emphasizing its rugged, adventure-ready character. The wheels are large, black, and multi-spoked, suitable for both urban and off-road environments. The overall build suggests a sturdy metal frame with glass windows and rubber tires, typical of contemporary SUVs.
description: A boxy, black SUV with a white roof, tinted windows, and a rear-mounted spare tire, featuring large black multi-spoke wheels and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold grille, rectangular headlights, and the black-and-white color contrast.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the four doors, tinted windows, and large black wheels; the spare tire is visible at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spare tire mounted on the back door and the taillights; side profile of the other SUV is also visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same door and wheel features, with the white roof and black body clearly visible.
attribute_wheel_design: black multi-spoke rims with a solid, modern pattern
